name: paris_bakery
_comment: User 2026-05-23: new BG has the open door on the RIGHT edge (screen x≈1209-1351), not the left. Exit hotspot flipped to match — arrow now points RIGHT. PP enters near the door so he can immediately turn back if needed; spawnY=499 puts his foot at y=769 on the floor strip between the tables and the back counter.
